title: Extract proposal workspace page from review workspace
summary: Modularize the macOS review/navigation workspace by extracting the proposal workspace dashboard page into its own native source file.
acceptance_criteria: StudioMacProposalArtifactsPage and its local dashboard helpers move out of StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift into a dedicated macOS source file.
The extracted page preserves proposal dashboard counts, linkage summaries, selected artifact behavior, and reload semantics.
The main review workspace file becomes meaningfully smaller and proposal workspace ownership becomes clearer.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: The proposal workspace dashboard page and its local summary/reload helpers now live in `StudioMacReviewNavigationProposalWorkspace.swift` instead of staying embedded in the main review workspace file.

The extraction preserved proposal counts, validation summaries, linkage metrics, selected-artifact behavior, and artifact reload semantics while further shrinking the main review workspace owner surface.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the proposal workspace extraction.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after the extraction.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0030: extract StudioMacProposalArtifactsPage and proposal workspace dashboard summary into a dedicated macOS file.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the slice focused on the proposal workspace page shell and local summary helpers.
Reuse the already extracted proposal list and detail support surfaces instead of re-merging responsibilities.
